title: placea germainii subsp. lutea
intro: Placea germainii subsp. lutea, also known as Yellow Passion Flower, is a subspecies of Passiflora that is native to the Americas. It is a climbing vine with fragrant yellow flowers, and its medicinal properties include its ability to act as a sedative and an antispasmodic. The health benefits of Placea germainii subsp. lutea include its potential to reduce anxiety and insomnia, as well as alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Placea germainii subsp. lutea include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
